summary: Backend testing for ToS Compliance & Location Fraud Prevention endpoints (Iteration 249). All 18 tests passed after fixing a bug in notification data serialization. Verified all compliance endpoints including location fraud reporting, ToS acknowledgement, violation creation, appeals, and admin dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: Notification.data field was receiving dict instead of JSON string - added json.dumps() to all notification creations in compliance.py
Haversine distance calculation is accurate for location fraud detection
Strike system correctly escalates: 1 strike=warning, 2=7d suspension, 3=30d suspension, 4+=permanent ban
Appeal approval correctly restores user status and reduces strike count
All compliance routes properly registered under /api/compliance prefix

test_credentials.note: This user is also an admin

seed_data_creation: Created test violations for user a8d52460-cdea-4977-b718-c8722c5c262d during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Compliance endpoints are fully functional. The photographer test user (dpritzker0905@gmail.com) is an admin. Test violations were created for user a8d52460-cdea-4977-b718-c8722c5c262d - one was overturned via appeal. The Notification model's data field expects a JSON string, not a dict.

TestTosStatusEndpoint.test_get_tos_status_existing_user: PASSED - Returns user_id, current_version, acknowledged, acknowledged_at

TestAdminViolationCreation.test_create_violation_admin_success: PASSED - Returns 404 for non-existent target user

TestUserViolationsEndpoint.test_get_user_violations: PASSED - Returns user_id, total_strikes, is_suspended, is_banned, violations[]
TestUserViolationsEndpoint.test_get_violations_nonexistent_user: PASSED - Returns empty violations with 0 strikes

verified_features: POST /api/compliance/report-location-fraud - Creates ToS violation for significant distance discrepancies (>0.5 miles)
POST /api/compliance/violations - Admin creates ToS violations manually
GET /api/compliance/violations/user/{user_id} - Returns all violations for a user
GET /api/compliance/dashboard - Admin compliance dashboard with stats
Strike system: minor=1pt, moderate=2pt, severe=3pt, critical=5pt
Action escalation: 1 strike=warning, 2=7d suspension, 3=30d suspension, 4+=permanent ban
Appeal approval restores user status and reduces strike count

bug_fixed.issue: Notification.data field was receiving dict instead of JSON string
bug_fixed.fix: Added json.dumps() to all notification data fields (lines 207-212, 298, 456, 466)
bug_fixed.root_cause: Notification model's data column is Text type expecting JSON string, but code was passing Python dict
